33.reason: [Calling Dpr(101) is incorrect because 101 is not a valid vertex (vertices are 0 to n-1, and n <= 100). This causes undefined behavior and does not represent "before deletion" traversal.]

37.reason: [After deletion, traversal should start from vertex 0 (as per problem), but Dpr(k) skips k and starts DFS from the first unvisited vertex, which may not be 0 if 0 was visited in prior traversals. Also, global visit array is reused without proper reset relative to deletion state.]
